documentation.file_docstring: Detect MIME type from URL extension or data URL. Uses shared MIME detection for consistency with core handling.
inline_comments: Use shared MIME detection (extension-based for URLs)

Extract filename from URL or local path. For local paths, extracts original filename if stored with embedded name pattern. Falls back to deriving the extension from MIME type when no extension present.
Handle data URLs: derive extension from MIME
Try to extract from URL pathname
No extension in URL, derive from MIME
Local paths - use extractOriginalFilename to extract embedded original name
Check if a URL refers to a local file path.
Windows rooted path on current drive (e.g. \tmp\file.txt)
Windows drive-letter absolute path (e.g. C:\foo\bar.txt or C:/foo/bar.txt)
Extract the message ID from a Bot Framework response.

functions.name: getMimeType
functions.doc: Detect MIME type from URL extension or data URL.   Uses shared MIME detection for consistency with core handling.

functions.name: extractFilename
functions.doc: Extract filename from URL or local path.   For local paths, extracts original filename if stored with embedded name patt

functions.doc: Check if a URL refers to a local file path.

functions.doc: Extract the message ID from a Bot Framework response.
